channel.title: Shuwei Academic System on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Shuwei Academic System on yexca'Blog

item.title: Import Course Schedule to Calendar (Shuwei Academic System)
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash Intro Checking your course schedule on the school’s academic system isn’t convenient. Plus, third-party apps come with security risks and way too many ads. So, I figured I’d import my course schedule directly into a calendar. I went with Outlook Calendar for seamless sync across iOS, Windows, and Android. Setup A computer An Android phone Chrome browser installed on your computer: Official Link WakeUp Course Schedule app …
